  7. Personal Assistant to the CEO

Personal Assistant to the CEO

Virtual Reality Training S.R.L.

Admin & Office

1 month ago

Share link

Share on WhatsApp Share on LinkedIn Share on Facebook Share on Twitter

Job summary

If you like to work self-driven, different tasks from administration / project management / marketing to elearning, you like responsibility and you don’t like micro-management from your boss, and you can adapt to the european mentality of our team, this job is for you.

Min Qualification: Degree Experience Level: Senior level Experience Length: 7 years Working Hours: Full Time

Job descriptions & requirements

Responsibilities:

Project Management (10–15%):

  • Monitor daily employee productivity by reviewing assigned tasks, time spent, and overall output.
  • Prepare and share daily productivity reports.
  • Support the coordination of ongoing projects and, where required, provide customers with project status updates.


Administration (10–20%):

  • Manage and organise the email inbox to ensure all customer requests are properly tracked and addressed.
  • Maintain an overview of tasks and to-do items to support effective prioritisation and follow-through.


E-Learning Support (10–30%):

  • Rewrite and structure learning content for the automated virtual reality driving e-learning platform in line with provided guidelines.
  • Test e-learning lessons independently or with users/learner drivers to ensure clarity, usability, and effectiveness.


Marketing Support (10–20%):

  • Support recruitment activities, including sourcing candidates or suppliers and conducting preliminary interviews based on provided guidelines.
  • Organise periodic online employee engagement activities.

Logistics Support (5–10%):

  • Coordinate the ordering of hardware and other required items according to specifications.
  • Research and support processes related to customs duties and shipping requirements.
  • Assist with organising travel arrangements, including flight tickets and hotel accommodations, as required.


Requirements:

  • 7 years of experience
  • Degree in a related field

Job summary

If you like to work self-driven, different tasks from administration / project management / marketing to elearning, you like responsibility and you don’t like micro-management from your boss, and you can adapt to the european mentality of our team, this job is for you.

Project Management (10–15%):

  • Monitor daily employee productivity by reviewing assigned tasks, time spent, and overall output.

  • Support the coordination of ongoing projects and, where required, provide customers with project status updates.


Administration (10–20%):

  • Manage and organise the email inbox to ensure all customer requests are properly tracked and addressed.
  • Maintain an overview of tasks and to-do items to support effective prioritisation and follow-through.


E-Learning Support (10–30%):

  • Rewrite and structure learning content for the automated virtual reality driving e-learning platform in line with provided guidelines.
  • Test e-learning lessons independently or with users/learner drivers to ensure clarity, usability, and effectiveness.


Marketing Support (10–20%):

  • Communicate with customers through written correspondence and respond to inquiries in line with provided guidelines.
  • Support website improvement initiatives, including content writing and article enhancement.
  • Assist with the development of interactive tools using AI, following initial instructions.
  • Support basic SEO optimisation activities to improve online visibility.


Human Resources Support (10–15%):

  • Support recruitment activities, including sourcing candidates or suppliers and conducting preliminary interviews based on provided guidelines.
  • Organise periodic online employee engagement activities.
  • Compile and share daily reports on employee goals and achievements.


Logistics Support (5–10%):

  • Coordinate the ordering of hardware and other required items according to specifications.
  • Research and support processes related to customs duties and shipping requirements.
  • Assist with organising travel arrangements, including flight tickets and hotel accommodations, as required.


Requirements:

  • 7 years of experience
  • Degree in a related field

## Privacy Preference Center

#### Your Privacy
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.   
[Privacy Policy](https://www.jobberman.com/privacy-policy)
#### Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off.
#### Social Media Cookies
Social Media Cookies
These cookies are set by a range of social media services that we have added to the site to enable you to share our content with your friends and networks. They are capable of tracking your browser across other sites and building up a profile of your interests. This may impact the content and messages you see on other websites you visit. If you do not allow these cookies you may not be able to use or see these sharing tools.
#### Statistics & Analytics Cookies
Statistics & Analytics Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.
#### Marketing Cookies
Marketing Cookies
These cookies help us and our partners to show personalized and relevant ads based on your browsing behavior with us, even when you later visit other websites.
#### Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalization. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

#  Personal Assistant to the CEO 
##  Virtual Reality Training S.R.L. 
##   Admin & Office ⟨24⟩
1 month ago 
 ⟨29⟩  ⟨30⟩  ⟨31⟩
###  Share link 
 Share on WhatsApp ⟨32⟩  Share on LinkedIn ⟨33⟩  Share on Facebook ⟨34⟩  Share on Twitter ⟨35⟩ Share via SMS
###  Job summary 
If you like to work self-driven, different tasks from administration / project management / marketing to elearning, you like responsibility and you don’t like micro-management from your boss, and you can adapt to the european mentality of our team, this job is for you. 
Min Qualification:  Degree  Experience Level:  Senior level  Experience Length: 7 years Working Hours: Full Time 
###  Job descriptions & requirements 
**Responsibilities:**
**Project Management (10–15%):**  

  * Monitor daily employee productivity by reviewing assigned tasks, time spent, and overall output.
  * Prepare and share daily productivity reports.
  * Support the coordination of ongoing projects and, where required, provide customers with project status updates.


**  
**
**Administration (10–20%):**  

  * Manage and organise the email inbox to ensure all customer requests are properly tracked and addressed.
  * Maintain an overview of tasks and to-do items to support effective prioritisation and follow-through.


**  
**
**E-Learning Support (10–30%):**  

  * Rewrite and structure learning content for the automated virtual reality driving e-learning platform in line with provided guidelines.
  * Test e-learning lessons independently or with users/learner drivers to ensure clarity, usability, and effectiveness.


**  
**
**Marketing Support (10–20%):**  

  * Communicate with customers through written correspondence and respond to inquiries in line with provided guidelines.
  * Support website improvement initiatives, including content writing and article enhancement.
  * Assist with the development of interactive tools using AI, following initial instructions.
  * Support basic SEO optimisation activities to improve online visibility.


**  
**
**Human Resources Support (10–15%):**  

  * Support recruitment activities, including sourcing candidates or suppliers and conducting preliminary interviews based on provided guidelines.
  * Organise periodic online employee engagement activities.
  * Compile and share daily reports on employee goals and achievements.


**  
**
**Logistics Support (5–10%):**  

  * Coordinate the ordering of hardware and other required items according to specifications.
  * Research and support processes related to customs duties and shipping requirements.
  * Assist with organising travel arrangements, including flight tickets and hotel accommodations, as required.


  

**Requirements:**
  * 7 years of experience
  * Degree in a related field


  

 Log In and Apply ⟨36⟩

  * Do not make any payment without confirming with the Jobberman Customer Support Team.
